prompt: I want to add a pack-members feature. Users belong to packs and I need to list members, view a member profile, and invite new members. Guide me through building this.

assertions.text: Guides creation starting from backend (Convex schema) before frontend (hooks, components, screens)
Includes a Convex schema definition with defineTable, validators, and indexes
Shows helper functions with QueryCtx/MutationCtx (not just inline handler logic)
Places hooks in features/pack-members/hooks/ (not app/ or root hooks/)
Screen examples are thin wrappers (<50 lines) that compose feature components
Uses @/ path alias in imports (matching project convention)
Addresses all three requested features: list members, view profile, invite members
